_notes.scoring: Official Digital SAT reports 2 section scores (Reading and Writing 200–800 + Math 200–800 = 400–1600). Mock topics match those 2 scored axes. College Board also shows 8 content domains for skills insight; those are nested inside the two sections for prep framing.
_notes.bank: 350 cards (175 per section). Session: 49 questions (27 RW + 22 Math) proportional to official 54/44.
_notes.coverPanelKind: building | hvac | safety | survey | datacenter | finance
